출처: SCCS Opinion on Propyl- and Butylparaben / Butylparaben
근거요약: SCCS used conservative NOEL 2 mg/kg bw/day for calculation of MoS of propyl- and butylparaben in older conservative assessment; later CIR alternative NOAEL 160 exists but SCCS priority selected.
SCCS cited NOAEL 20 mg/kg bw/day (90-day) and 15 mg/kg bw/day (1-generation reprotox); conservative 15 used.
SCCS/RIVM assessment states current NOAEL 1000 mg/kg bw/day for methylparaben was not contradicted by newer studies.
SCCS considered additional studies support deriving NOAEL for reproductive endpoints at 1000 mg/kg bw/day.
SCCS considered 80 mg/kg bw/day as NOAEL in 13-week oral rat study.

출처: SCCS Opinion on Salicylic Acid, SCCS/1646/22 / SCCS/1601/18 lineage
근거요약: For MoS calculations SCCS uses developmental toxicity NOAEL 75 mg/kg bw/day from Tanaka et al.

출처: OECD SIDS / CIR repeated-dose oral toxicity
근거요약: Benzoic acid repeated-dose oral toxicity studies give NOAEL 800 mg/kg/day.
OECD SIDS reports NOAELs about 6750 mg/kg/day in mice and about 2250 mg/kg/day in rats; conservative 2250 used.

출처: CIR/Safety Assessment, long-term study conservative lower species value
근거요약: Long-term studies on benzyl alcohol yielded NOAEL >400 mg/kg bw/day in rats and >200 mg/kg bw/day in mice; conservative 200 used.
90-day drinking-water studies reported NOAELs around 151-179 mg/kg bw/day; conservative 151 used.

출처: CIR Amended Safety Assessment of p-Phenylenediamine
근거요약: CIR draft/amended assessment reports NOAEL/NOEL values around 5-10 mg/kg/day and notes NOAEL 8 mg/kg/day used for MoS; strong sensitizer/genotoxicity context requires expert review.

출처: US EPA IRIS Toxicological Review of Phenol
근거요약: EPA toxicological review discusses chronic NOAEL 60 mg/kg/day for phenol toxicity; used as conservative repeated exposure PoD.

출처: Australian Industrial Chemicals evaluation / repeated-dose study
근거요약: Repeated-dose oral study reported NOAEL 20 mg/kg bw/day for 90 days; benzophenone has carcinogenicity/endocrine concerns so expert review remains needed.
28일 및 90일 경구 rat study에서 NOAEL 250 mg/kg bw/day로 제시. MoS용 PoD로 적용.
Prenatal developmental toxicity에서 maternal toxicity NOAEL 200 mg/kg bw/day, developmental toxicity NOAEL 1000 mg/kg bw/day 보고. 보수적으로 200 적용.
SCCS는 oral exposure 자료에서 NOAEL 50 mg/kg bw/day를 MoS 계산에 사용할 수 있는 값으로 제시.

출처: AICIS Human health tier II assessment / REACH
근거요약: Sub-chronic oral toxicity study에서 NOAEL >550 mg/kg bw/day 보고. 보수적으로 550 적용.
Developmental toxicity study에서 maternal toxicity NOAEL 100 mg/kg/day, fetal toxicity/teratogenicity NOAEL 1000 mg/kg/day. 보수적으로 100 적용.

출처: AICIS Human health tier II assessment / CIR / US EPA
근거요약: 90일 식이 rat study에서 NOEL 150 ppm, 약 12 mg/kg bw/day로 제시. 보수적 PoD로 적용.
m-/p-cresol 자료에서 general toxicity NOAEL 30 mg/kg bw/day로 제시. 생식독성 NOAEL은 더 높지만 일반독성 보수값 적용.
EPA IRIS RfD derivation에서 principal study의 NOAEL 223 mg/kg-day를 제시. CIR/OECD의 625보다 보수적인 값을 적용.
90일 gavage study에서 NOAEL 100 mg/kg-day, duration-adjusted 71 mg/kg-day가 RfD의 critical effect로 제시. duration-adjusted 71 적용.
13주 oral gavage rat repeated-dose toxicity study에서 systemic toxicity NOAEL 25 mg/kg-day로 제시.
Reproductive effects에 대한 보수적 NOAEL 40 mg/kg bw/day를 사용해 MOE를 평가한 자료. 해당 값을 적용.

출처: RIFM/ECHA acetophenone read-across used in fragrance assessment
근거요약: ECHA REACH dossier: acetophenone OECD 408 gavage study에서 NOAEL 250 mg/kg/day가 read-across 기준으로 사용됨.

출처: RIFM fragrance ingredient safety assessment, cinnamyl alcohol
근거요약: Cinnamyl alcohol repeated dose toxicity NOAEL 22.62 mg/kg/day로 제시. 향료 원료 평가이므로 중간 신뢰도로 적용.

출처: RIFM fragrance ingredient safety assessment, cinnamaldehyde
근거요약: Repeated dose toxicity NOAEL 100 mg/kg/day, developmental toxicity NOAEL 1200 mg/kg/day. 보수적으로 repeated-dose 100 적용.
13주 dietary rat study에서 repeated-dose toxicity NOAEL 300 mg/kg/day로 제시. 반복독성 PoD로 적용.

출처: RIFM fragrance ingredient safety assessment, Isoeugenol
근거요약: Repeated dose toxicity에서 가장 보수적인 systemic exposure-derived NO(A)EL 37.5 mg/kg/day로 제시. 향료 원료 평가로 적용.
Repeated-dose toxicity NOAEL 33 mg/kg/day, developmental toxicity NOAEL 180 mg/kg/day, fertility NOAEL 245 mg/kg/day. 보수적으로 33 적용.

기준치_출처: CIR Safety Assessment / AICIS human health assessment
기준치_근거요약: Methyl alcohol repeated-dose/developmental dataset reports NOAEL 500 mg/kg bw/day; humans are more sensitive to methanol, so 전문가 검토 필요.
비고: 메탄올은 인체 민감도가 커서 화장품 실제 잔류한도/사용조건 병행 검토 필요.

기준치_근거요약: RIFM safety assessment gives repeated-dose toxicity NOAEL 385 mg/kg/day for phenethyl alcohol.
비고: 향료 성분으로 화장품 원료 관련성 높음.

기준치_근거요약: CIR glycerin report states oral NOAEL for maternal toxicity and teratogenicity in rats was 1310 mg/kg/day.
비고: 화장품 원료 관련성 높음.

기준치_출처: SCCP Opinion on Diethylene Glycol Monobutyl Ether
기준치_근거요약: SCCP opinion identifies NOAEL 250 mg/kg bw/day from a 13-week drinking water rat study.
비고: 화장품 용제 관련성 높음.

기준치_근거요약: EFSA flavouring evaluation reports 13-week rat NOEL 150 mg/kg bw/day for 6-methylcoumarin.
비고: 향료/쿠마린 계열. 알레르기·감작성 별도 검토 필요.

기준치_근거요약: RIFM derives repeated-dose NOAEL 13.33 mg/kg/day from 40 mg/kg/day OECD 422 study using factor 3.
비고: 향료/방부 보조 성격, 국소자극 별도 검토 필요.

기준치_근거요약: SCCP 1-naphthol opinion reports a 12-week rat study NOAEL 20 mg/kg bw/day.
비고: 염모/페놀계 성분. 감작성/국소효과 별도 검토 필요.

기준치_근거요약: OECD SIDS states systemic toxicity NOEL 10 mg/kg bw/day in females and LOEL 10 mg/kg bw/day in males.
비고: 성별 차이로 보수적 해석 필요.

기준치_근거요약: EPA PPRTV derives provisional RfD using rat reproductive study NOAEL 3.0 mg/kg-day and LOAEL 30 mg/kg-day.
비고: 염소화 페놀. 발암성/국소효과는 별도 검토 필요.

기준치_출처: ECHA RAC Opinion / OECD SIDS DEHP
기준치_근거요약: ECHA RAC/OECD identifies conservative NOAEL 4.8 mg/kg bw/day for testicular/reproductive toxicity.
비고: 생식독성 우려 물질. 규제 준수 확인 필수.

기준치_출처: Japan MOE Initial Risk Assessment / ATSDR Chlorophenols
기준치_근거요약: Monochlorophenol assessment identifies oral non-toxic level/NOAEL 5 mg/kg/day based on reproductive-developmental rat effects.
비고: p-Chlorophenol로 적용. 이성질체/문헌 일치성 전문가 확인 필요.

기준치_근거요약: CIR/SCCS discussion uses LOAEL 50 mg/kg bw/day from 90-day oral rat study and UF3 to derive NOAEL-equivalent 16.67 mg/kg bw/day for MOE.
비고: 유전독성/자동산화 염모제 성격. MoS가 높아도 전문가 검토 필요.

기준치_근거요약: FDA nonclinical review reports no effects on fetal weight at 250 mg/kg/day and teratogenic NOAEL high dose 500 mg/kg/day; 250 used conservatively.
비고: 국소마취제/약리활성 성분. 화장품 TTC 대상 아님, 실제 제품 용도·농도별 전문가 검토 필요.

기준치_출처: PubMed repeated oral dose toxicity study
기준치_근거요약: One-month repeated oral dose toxicity study reports nontoxic dose 0.06 mg/kg/day in sham rats and below 0.06 mg/kg/day in uninephrectomized rats.
비고: 항암제/약리활성 성분으로 일반 화장품 TTC/MoS 틀만으로 판정 부적절.

기준치_근거요약: OECD SIDS identifies the lowest reliable NOAEL for haemolysis in rat as 24.6 ppm, equivalent to 22.5 mg/kg/day.
비고: 경로 변환 포함. 용제 노출 시 흡입/피부 시나리오 별도 확인 필요.

기준치_출처: US EPA Inert Reassessment / Diethyl Phthalate
기준치_근거요약: EPA reassessment reports repeated-dose NOAEL for rats of 1600 mg/kg/day (males; female NOAEL 2500 mg/kg/day). The lower value was applied conservatively.
비고: Fragrance solvent/denaturant context. Reproductive/endocrine context should still be shown in toxicology tab.

기준치_근거요약: ATSDR derived intermediate oral MRL for 2-chlorophenol using a NOAEL of 7.6 mg/kg/day and LOAEL of 76 mg/kg/day for reproductive effects in rats.
비고: Chlorophenol; local irritation and regulatory restrictions should be evaluated separately.

기준치_근거요약: ATSDR intermediate-duration oral MRL worksheet identifies BMDL1SD 2.07 mg/kg/day as POD for decreased delayed-type hypersensitivity response in rats.
비고: BMDL was used directly as PoD; immunotoxicity endpoint. Cosmetic local effects not covered by MoS alone.

기준치_출처: RIFM update to butyl alcohol safety assessment
기준치_근거요약: RIFM update considered an inhalation-derived systemic NOAEL of 41 mg/kg/day for repeated-dose risk assessment of butyl alcohol.
비고: Route conversion is involved; mark as medium confidence and check product exposure scenario.

기준치_출처: ATSDR Toxicological Profile for Cresols / EPA IRIS
기준치_근거요약: ATSDR/EPA IRIS reports oral RfDs for o- and m-cresol based on NOAELs of 50 mg/kg/day in 90-day gavage studies for body weight and neurotoxicity endpoints.
비고: Cresol isomers are irritant/corrosive; local effects should be indicated separately.

기준치_출처: RIFM m-Cresol safety assessment / ATSDR Cresols
기준치_근거요약: RIFM reports an OECD TG 408 13-week oral gavage study where the repeated-dose NOAEL for m-cresol was considered 50 mg/kg/day.
비고: Cresol isomers are irritant/corrosive; local effects should be indicated separately.

기준치_근거요약: RIFM states repeated-dose data are insufficient and uses TTC for a Cramer Class I material, 30 µg/kg/day, for carvacrol risk assessment at current use levels.
비고: Not a PoD. Corrects prior overly conservative Cramer III fallback to literature-supported Cramer I TTC; still preliminary.
